name: Public Endpoint Re-enabled
failure_mode: Operator toggles publicNetworkAccess=Enabled on Azure OpenAI via Portal. NetworkPostureProbe public_reachable=True.
detection: external_sink_disabled.json absent or stale. gate_private_network_static fails.
remediation: 1. Re-disable publicNetworkAccess via Bicep (not Portal). 2. Re-run verify_private_network_posture.py. 3. Verify external_sink_disabled.json has written_by='verify_private_network_posture'.
